name: Cold Redfish Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of water to a boil and add enough water to cover the redfish.
Add onions, salt, and pepper. Cook for about 15 minutes until done.
Remove bones and skin.
2. Add bell pepper, celery, green onion tops, and parsley.
Season with lemon juice, mustard, and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Pour most of the fish stock into a mold and refrigerate until congealed.
4. Serve with mayonnaise and crackers.
Also suitable for any edible fish; best used with bony types (Sheepshead, etc.).
